root.command: ALTER TABLE RepairStatusesTbl ADD StatusNote NVARCHAR(255) NULL
UPDATE RepairStatusesTbl SET StatusNote = 'Equipment to be collected.' WHERE RepairStatusID = 1
UPDATE RepairStatusesTbl SET StatusNote = 'Equipment collected.' WHERE RepairStatusID = 2
UPDATE RepairStatusesTbl SET StatusNote = 'Equipment at the workshop for assessment/repair.' WHERE RepairStatusID = 3
UPDATE RepairStatusesTbl SET StatusNote = 'Awaiting required parts for repair.' WHERE RepairStatusID = 4
UPDATE RepairStatusesTbl SET StatusNote = 'Repair estimate has been provided.' WHERE RepairStatusID = 5
UPDATE RepairStatusesTbl SET StatusNote = 'Equipment ready for return/delivery.' WHERE RepairStatusID = 6
UPDATE RepairStatusesTbl SET StatusNote = 'Repair completed and order closed.' WHERE RepairStatusID = 7
SELECT RepairStatusID, RepairStatusDesc, StatusNote FROM RepairStatusesTbl ORDER BY RepairStatusID
